titleStmt.title: Letter from A.J. Digan to Miss Murray, 12 September, 1916.
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: A.J. Digan

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: This letter is from Lieutenant Colonel A.J.Digan, Connaught Rangers, a prisoner of war in Bulgaria. This typewritten note refers to applications for assistance, boots, and clothing, received from two Connaught Rangers Prisoners of War in Sofia, Bulgaria. Writer asks that, if these men are not already on the books (possibly of the Irish Women's Association), assistance should be sent. There is also a handwritten note on the back summarising the letter and adding "wrote to I.W.A. Sep 19 1916".

msIdentifier.collection: Clonbrock Estate Papers, Collection List No. 54; Ms. 35,796/11/7a

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
Kinsale, 12th Sept, 1916. Dear Miss Murray, Application has been received from No. 4807
Private R.Finch FRENCH and No. 5243 Pte W. Hore, The
Connaught Rangers, who stated that they are
Prisoner's of War at Sofia, Bulgaria, and who ask
for assistance, boots and clothing. If these men's names are not already on your
books, can you please arrange that assistance be
sent them. Yours sincerely, A.J. Digan
1916
Sep: 16
French & Hore C.R.
Col. Digan
2 Prisioners of War
to miss Murray —
re - Prisoners of War
Bulgaria
Wrote to
J.W.A. Sep: 19.1916
